overview: InfraOS is India's AI Operating System for Infrastructure — a full-stack enterprise SaaS platform for infrastructure governance, procurement, execution, risk intelligence, and asset lifecycle management. Built for governments, EPCs, ministries, and infrastructure funds.
features: AI Command Center dashboard with real NIP data and KPI analytics
5 intelligence modules: Procurement, Execution, Commercial Risk, Governance, Asset Intelligence
National Infrastructure Map with satellite view and project overlays
AI Copilot powered by Gemini for real-time infrastructure intelligence
Dynamic organization switcher (MoRTH, NHAI, Smart Cities, NHIDCL)
35+ real tender entries from major Indian infrastructure authorities
Vendor Intelligence Graph with contractor risk scoring
Real-time risk hub with project risk scores and trend sparklines
Project Audit Trail with timestamped actions and CSV export
Advanced Analytics Export with multi-sheet data and pivot tables
All download/export buttons trigger real file downloads with actual data
